name: multicam-live
description: Sistema de transmissão ao vivo com múltiplos celulares via rede local WiFi privada

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:camera" "npm run dev:monitor"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:all && npm run dev --workspace=desktop-app
scripts.build:all: npm run build:monitor && npm run build:mobile-camera
scripts.build: npm run build:all && npm run dist --workspace=desktop-app
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:all && npm run dist:linux --workspace=desktop-app
